Subject: Follow-up: [Topic or Project Name]
Hi [Name],
I hope you’re having a productive week.
I’m following up on our recent discussion regarding [topic]. I wanted to see if you had any updates or if there’s any additional information I can provide to help move things forward.
Looking forward to hearing from you.
Best regards,
[Your Name]
